title: Add rich contextual logging and debug controls to RenodeServer and sim_client
description: Implement structlog integration, node state in logs, zero-overhead debug for Renode bridge and Zephyr sim radio client. Include transaction tracking with tx_id, state transitions. Follow existing patterns in simulation.py.
close_reason: Enhanced logging, metrics, state monitoring, fail-fast checks, Renode/Zephyr tool integration and tests implemented. All tests passing.
